name: Write Tests for String Utility Module
description: The file `string_utils.py` has four utility functions but no tests. Write a comprehensive test file `test_string_utils.py` using pytest. Cover: normal cases, edge cases (empty strings, special characters, unicode), and error cases. Aim for at least 12 test functions with descriptive names. All tests must pass.
expected_outcomes: Tests cover truncate, slugify, count_words, wrap_lines
Tests include edge cases (empty strings, special chars, unicode)
